---
ID: US-SLD-053
Title: Add Multi-Slide Deck Workflows
Status: Backlog
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
---

As a slide editor user
I want to work with multiple slides in a deck
So I can build and deliver complete presentations in one workspace

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Deck model supports ordered slide collections.
- [ ] User can create a new slide inside a deck.
- [ ] User can duplicate existing slides.
- [ ] User can delete slides.
- [ ] User can reorder slides.
- [ ] User can import HTML as a single new slide in current deck.
- [ ] User can import HTML as a new deck.
- [ ] Slide navigation is fast and stable across deck operations.
- [ ] Slide-level autosave remains correct while working across multiple slides.
